hero: Partner with Elite Capital to access high-growth and community-focused developments.

aboutsub.text: As a DFSA-authorised private equity firm, we provide access to a carefully curated pipeline of real estate investments in Ontario, Canada. Our investment strategy is rooted in thorough due diligence, deep local knowledge and global fund management expertise. We focus on investing in purpose-built and shovel ready residential projects that have undergone extensive planning and permitting. This meticulous approach ensures that our investors benefit from reduced risk and enhanced potential for strong and sustainable returns.

residentialHead: Canadian residential real estate is an attractive investment opportunity
residentialPara: Canada presents a compelling investment opportunity within the G7, driven by its robust and stable economy and rich natural resources. This foundation, coupled with a rapidly expanding population and significant housing demand, creates an ideal environment for real estate investment.
residentialSub2: The following structural factors make Canada's residential real estate market attractive for investors seeking diversification and durable, risk-adjusted returns.

features.title: Structural Housing Demand
features.para: Canada's population is projected to grow substantially over the coming decades, with Statistics Canada's 2026 projections pointing to a total population of between 50 and 60 million by 2050. While recent adjustments to Canada's immigration levels plan have moderated near-term growth expectations, the country's structural housing deficit and existing demographic demand continue to create a compelling, long-term residential real estate opportunity - particularly across Ontario's key urban markets.

features.title: Housing shortage
features.para: Canada is facing a structural housing deficit of approximately 2.6 million homes by 2035 (CMHC, 2025), requiring between 430,000 and 480,000 new residential units per year to restore affordability to 2019 levels. This represents one of the most significant supply-demand imbalances in the G7, and creates a durable, long-term investment backdrop for purpose-built residential development across Ontario's key urban markets.

features.title: Economic and political stability
features.para: Canada's strong economy and stable political environment create a reliable foundation for long-term investment. The country maintains a top-tier sovereign credit rating of Aaa/AAA from Moody's and S&P respectively - the highest possible rating from two of the world's three major agencies - alongside the lowest net debt-to-GDP ratio in the G7, and a long-standing commitment to institutional stability and the rule of law.

exclusiveSub: Our exclusive pipeline of 45+ community-centred developments is strategically located across Ontario, Canada’s most populous province and the largest contributor to the national economy.
contactSub: Contact us to learn more about our investment opportunities.
